calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Petitioner Gabariel Evan CortezSpencer Elvin Clohan not present in court.

This Petition seeks to conform Petitioner''s name to his or her gender identity.

If no objection is timely filed The Court shall grant the Petition without a hearing. Pursuant to CCP 1277 (a)(5), publication is waived, seeking to conform petitioner''''s name to petitioner''''s gender identity.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to Olive C. Elvin.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
